_comment: claude-solo recommended MCP servers. Copy to .mcp.json in your project root or ~/.claude/.mcp.json for global use. Fill in credentials where needed.

cclsp._comment: LSP navigation — find_definition, find_references, get_diagnostics, find_workspace_symbols. Requires: npm install -g cclsp. Python: pip install python-lsp-server. See https://github.com/ktnyt/cclsp for config.

github._comment: GitHub API: repos, PRs, issues, code search, Actions. Requires GITHUB_TOKEN.

playwright._comment: Browser automation and E2E testing. No credentials needed.

postgres._comment: Read-only PostgreSQL access. Set your connection string.

filesystem._comment: File system access with configurable allowed directories.

brave-search._comment: Web search via Brave Search API. Free tier: 2000 queries/month.

memory._comment: Persistent knowledge graph for cross-session context.

sentry._comment: Query production errors and stack traces from Sentry.
